ques: Show a list of the top 5 highest-grossing animated movies, sorted by box office earnings.
answer: The top 5 highest-grossing animated movies by box office are: 1) Ne Zha 2 — $2.216B (2025); 2) Zootopia 2 — $1.870B (2025); 3) Inside Out 2 — $1.699B (2024); 4) The Lion King — $1.662B (2019); 5) Frozen II — $1.452B (2019).
